name: sleep apnea
title: best herbal teas for sleep apnea
description: Silybum marianum tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, saponins, and sesquiterpenes that help to treat sleep apnea by reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and promoting relaxation. The diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties of this herbal tea help to alleviate symptoms of sleep apnea, such as snoring and breathing difficulties, by reducing fluid retention and swelling in the throat and airways.
